title: A-stack residual-correction leakage-flag root cause audit

falsification.preregistered_metric: ML-minus-traditional held-out-run robust-width delta and tail-fraction delta with run-block 95% bootstrap CIs

leakage_control_summary.criterion: control_minus_safe_ns < -0.10 flags a control that outperforms the accepted feature set enough to question leakage/control definition

failure_atoms.diagnostic: late-pool best ML minus late-pool traditional robust width
failure_atoms.interpretation: negative means the broad model sweep closes the S18e late-pool ridge degradation in point estimate

failure_atoms.diagnostic: best early-pool ML method and best late-pool ML method
failure_atoms.interpretation: checks whether the S18e failure is ridge/model-class specific rather than a universal learned-correction failure

failure_atoms.diagnostic: late-pool best ML minus traditional after 1-99 percent train-support filter
failure_atoms.interpretation: support-filtered retained fraction=0.740; if this closes, support mismatch or support-sensitive model selection is sufficient

failure_atoms.diagnostic: late-pool best ML degradation in Gaussian core sigma and full RMS
failure_atoms.interpretation: if only core sigma degrades, the atom is low-stat core fitting; if RMS also degrades, it is a distribution shift

failure_atoms.diagnostic: forbidden-feature, row-split, shuffled-target, and run-id sentinel flags
failure_atoms.interpretation: flags invalidate adoption but can explain suspicious row-split performance

failure_atoms.diagnostic: max KS statistic for train-vs-Sample-IV features, early vs late
failure_atoms.interpretation: larger late KS would identify support mismatch as the driver; similar KS shifts point to calibration-family labels

failure_atoms.diagnostic: largest per-run late-pool best-ML minus traditional gap
failure_atoms.interpretation: checks whether a single Sample-IV run creates the aggregate failure

next_tickets: S18j: A-stack monotone support-matched timewalk transfer with forbidden-control freeze
